(Translated by Google)
The best stop on Route 2
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRaFpxT213RRAB

reviews.comment:
Lugar ideal para una parada a mitad de camino. Tiene mesas para comer al aire libre si uno lo desea. Baños muy limpios. Detalle: ayer tenian problemas con los aires acondicionados. Aceptan tarjetas de crédito y debito

(Translated by Google)
Ideal spot for a mid-journey stop. They have tables for outdoor dining if desired. Very clean restrooms. Note: they were having air conditioning problems yesterday. They accept credit and debit cards.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURndFp5eTJRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Parte en 2 el viaje a Miramar. Paro siempre. Amplio y cómodo porque tiene un parque grande para hacer picnic o pasear al perro ;)

(Translated by Google)
It splits the trip to Miramar in two. I always stop there. Spacious and comfortable because it has a large park for picnics or walking the dog ;)
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNRdk5fQjZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
El combustible bien, como cualquier ypf, el resto carísimo, mala atención, poco cordial, baños sucios. Simulan descuento para socios cobrando sobreprecios

(Translated by Google)
The fuel was fine, like any YPF station, but everything else was extremely expensive, the service was poor and unfriendly, and the restrooms were dirty. They fake discounts for members by charging exorbitant prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2813003656748655180/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUN3NDVyM2FREAE
